changeSet.author: fraser
changeSet.comment: RSDEV-1154: widen AppConfigElement.value so it can hold Microsoft Teams Workflows webhook URLs, which are ~300 characters and no longer fit in VARCHAR(255). TEXT matches the 65535-character limit of SettingsType.TEXT.

changeSet.author: fraser
changeSet.comment: RSDEV-1154: change the MSTEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL property descriptor from STRING (max 255 chars) to TEXT (max 65535 chars) so validation accepts Teams Workflows webhook URLs. Type ordinal 4 = SettingsType.TEXT.
